Home / Services / Luxury Lease Return Detailing

Luxury Lease Return Detailing

Turn-in perfection for Savannah’s executive lessees.

Southside BMW and Critz Mercedes demand flawless returns—especially when lease terms coincide with our pollen-heavy springs. We exceed dealership standards with a 212-point checklist tailored to Lowcountry wear patterns.

Every inch gets scrutinized: we measure carpet pile depth to confirm no marsh mud remains, use borescopes to inspect vent ducts for accumulated sand, and replicate factory leather grain patterns on repaired bolsters. For wheel rims curbed on River Street’s uneven edges, we employ a proprietary alloy welding technique that avoids the ‘refinished’ look dealerships penalize. The final touch is a dealership-certified odor treatment, eliminating any trace of cigars from golf trips to The Landings or fish smells from Tybee excursions.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Dealership-specific wear measurement documentation
  2. 02 Step 2: Diamond-cut wheel restoration matching OEM finish
  3. 03 Step 3: Leather grain replication for repaired surfaces
  4. 04 Step 4: Certification package with before/after scans

Benefits

  • Average $1,200 reduction in lease charges
  • Meets European delivery program standards
  • Removes red clay staining from golf shoes
  • 24-hour rush service for sudden lease terminations

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you fix Hutchinson Island valet scratches?

Our paint correction specialists blend hotel valet marks so precisely that even under The DeSoto’s porte-cochere lighting, repairs are undetectable.

Do you handle exotic materials like carbon fiber?

Yes—we’re one of few detailers in Georgia certified to work with McLaren’s UV-sensitive clears and Porsche’s matte finishes, both common in The Landings’ collections.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with luxury lease return detailing? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-aut-r91
